mapper.select:
SELECT nvd_latest.member_no AS accountID , 'Server(VPC)' AS productID , 'NCP' AS csp , nvd_latest.demand_amount / 1400.0 AS bill , nvd_latest.instance_no AS resourceID FROM ( SELECT n1.instance_no, n1.member_no, n1.demand_amount FROM ncp_cost_vm_month n1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT instance_no, MAX(id) AS latest_id FROM ncp_cost_vm_month WHERE demand_month = #{year_month} GROUP BY instance_no ) n2 ON n1.instance_no = n2.instance_no AND n1.id = n2.latest_id ) nvd_latest INNER JOIN servicegroup_meta sm ON nvd_latest.instance_no COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = sm.csp_instanceid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND sm.csp_type = 'NCP' WHERE 1=1
AND sm.service_cd IN
#{selectedProject}
AND 1=0
